title: Groundpounder
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''groundpounder''' was the lower of the three main classes that inhabited [[Metellos/Legends|Metellos]]. The groundpounders consisted of [[datapusher]]s, plant workers, [[Con artist/Legends|con artists]], thieves, and indigents. Few groundpounders ever left their [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. They lived and died only within a few kilometers of their dwelling, bumping shoulders with more people in a day than most citizens of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] met in a year.<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>
